title: If it was the end of the world
display_title: If it was the end of the world
wikitext:
[]: If it was the end of the world......             Quote Post by Unit01Eva » Sun Sep 06, 2009 5:33 pm If it was the end of the world from a angel attack and the Eva's were on the bottom of ocean what would use? A bomb? A Gundam? A Terminator? Tell me I'll be waiting

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Sep 06, 2009 5:50 pm Well personally I'd use a Gundam. But hey, you know what would be cool? If an Eva and a gundam had a fight. I wonder who'd win...

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Sep 06, 2009 5:57 pm One of those dinosaurs from The Land Before Time.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Sep 06, 2009 6:12 pm I would send Captain Kirk after the Angel. He would say, "Hey! How many of you can dance on the head of a pin?" Then the Angel's head would explode. We win.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Sun Sep 06, 2009 6:42 pm master_lloyd wrote: Well personally I'd use a Gundam. But hey, you know what would be cool? If an Eva and a gundam had a fight. I wonder who'd win...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 06, 2009 6:45 pm I would use Super Mario.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Sep 06, 2009 7:17 pm I made a thread like this, but it got murdered when people went off topic. I would use a giant satellite laser to vaporize them. Then I will sweep up the ashes then sell them as mulch. OT: < 555 posts.

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Sun Sep 06, 2009 7:22 pm This question is obviously meant for everyone to choose gundam. You might have said, what would you use? Two things that obviously wouldn't work or a gundam? ...I would use a gundam to go down into the bottom of the ocean and get the Eva's back.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sun Sep 06, 2009 8:11 pm I still say Arm Slaves equiped with Lambda Drives could get the job done, albeit more of them

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Sep 06, 2009 9:21 pm I'd try to score with Misato . . err I mean I'd probly try to get the info on kaworu so NEVR Japan can clone him like they do Rei and send hiom out their to die time and again till its over. Rei would umm be with me yes

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 06, 2009 9:29 pm I'd send in Squirrel Girl.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Sep 06, 2009 10:41 pm I will have SOK on my side .

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 06, 2009 11:22 pm Hey guys look at what I found! http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7062

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 06, 2009 11:24 pm ^ bah, just wait a bit and some kindly (or vengeful) mod will merge (or lock) this nonsense. no biggie.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:22 pm Gurren Lagann, obviously. GIIIIIIIGAAAAAAAAAAAAA DRRRRRRIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIILLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLL BREAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAKERRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Mon Sep 07, 2009 5:51 pm NemZ wrote: I'd send in Squirrel Girl.

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Mon Sep 07, 2009 6:35 pm Squirrel Girl doesn't need backup. If we assume that we have to send in characters from franchises that are Japanese, I'd go with Gurren Lagann. Maybe Arc-Gurren Lagann. Failing this, Ultraman.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Mon Sep 07, 2009 8:49 pm BrikHaus wrote: Gurren Lagann, obviously. GIIIIIIIGAAAAAAAAAAAAA DRRRRRRIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIILLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLLL BREAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAKERRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Sep 07, 2009 10:09 pm Two words: Solid Snake

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Tue Sep 08, 2009 1:36 am I assume Reichu would put together a would-be band of heroes to try and stop Third Impact. We will have fan-wanked the technology to construct Longinus calibur weapons to combat the angels. However, I would make sure my materia was equipped prior to any of this.
